steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The colon explains the speaker's point: there is no better example of illustration than Parker's work. The blank must mean that no one has surpassed or outdone her work.

steps.title: Reject wrong verbs
steps.content: Choice A means gathered or called together. Choice C means added to or increased. Choice D means referenced. None expresses the idea that Parker's work remains unmatched. The verb meaning surpassed fits. The answer is B.
